query: List the five municipalities in Finnmark county with the highest number of buildings in 200-year flood zones, sorted by count descending.

1.description: get Finnmark county geometry and fylkesnummer

2.description: get all municipalities geometry and identifiers

3.description: select municipalities within Finnmark county boundary

5.description: get buildings with representation point and kommunenummer

6.description: select buildings located in Finnmark municipalities (attach municipality attributes)

7.description: select buildings that intersect 200-year flood areas

8.description: count distinct buildings per kommunenummer and kommunenavn

9.description: sort municipalities by building count descending
